## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] chore (maintenance/tooling)

## Spotlight Impact

- [ ] Uploader flow (`/upload`)
- [ ] Scout dashboard (`/scout`)
- [ ] API routes (`/api/*`)
- [ ] Supabase schema / RLS
- [ ] Mux integration
- [ ] Twelve Labs integration
- [ ] Stripe integration
- [ ] Docs / governance

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed

## Schema / Env Changes

List any migration files, policy updates, or new environment variables.

## Screenshots / Recordings (if UI)

Attach before/after screenshots or short clips.

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I updated docs for behavior, API, or setup changes
- [ ] I avoided committing secrets and verified config safety
